images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, radiating an elegant and sophisticated cyberpunk sci-fi vibe. She is dressed in a form-fitting, high-neck tight turtleneck sweater that accentuates her slim waist and ample chest, the fabric texture sleek and futuristic against her flawless skin, visible pores, and faint vellus hair. She stands in a reading corner surrounded by towering bookshelves, illuminated by a bright, clear refrigerator light glow that creates a high-key, overexposed atmosphere without heavy shadows. Captured at eye-level, she gently touches her finger near her lips in a moment of candid allure, her large expressive eyes engaging the viewer. The background features a modern, aesthetic apartment setting with a soft bokeh effect. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
